name: goal_v2_master
directive: User /goal: break T1+T3 CCC, 10-hour autonomous, get codex+grok feedback each iteration.

verdict_priors.T3-GSP_clear_+0.025_MCID: 3-15% (mean 9%) — DEAD by kimi/gemini, weak-prior by codex/deepseek
verdict_priors.split_conformal_calib_0.20: endorsed by kimi/gemini/deepseek as cleanest leakage-clean design

independent_estimands: T1_CONFORMAL_LOCKBOX (retained-subset CCC at coverage 100/90/80/70/60/50; deployment-mode publication; NOT in FWER family)
STRIDE_LOCKED_FoG (item-11 supplementary feature; NOT in T1/T3 FWER family)

slots.hypothesis: Per-task LGB specialists (one per task in {Balance, HurriedPace, SelfPace, TUG, TandemGait}) trained on V3-GSP task-tagged features for item-12 residual (load-bearing per Phase 0 ablation), blended via Ridge meta inside fold (FoldNormalizer), used as Stage-3 correction on iter34 item-12 OOF predictions, lifts T1 LOOCV CCC by Δ≥+0.025 vs iter34 hygiene-corrected baseline (N=92).
slots.kill_criteria_5fold: 5-fold Δ < +0.010 OR seed_std > 0.025 OR any task-specialist Ridge weight < 0 in >50% folds

slots.hypothesis: Same per-task specialist + Ridge meta architecture applied to T3 iter47 Stage-2 residual (instead of K=500 LGB only) lifts T3 LOOCV CCC by Δ≥+0.025 vs iter47 valid-range baseline (N=95).
slots.kill_criteria_5fold: 5-fold Δ < +0.010 OR Ridge meta unweighted-vs-weighted Δ inside bootstrap CI of 0

slots.hypothesis: Injecting V3-GSP task-tagged features into T3 iter47 Stage-2 LGB residual learner lifts 5-fold T3 CCC by Δ≥+0.010 (necessary condition for LOOCV lockbox).
slots.kill_criteria_5fold: 5-fold Δ < +0.010 OR seed_std > 0.025 OR top-5 K=500 LGB importance shows ≤2 GSP features

slots.hypothesis: Split-conformal abstention via V2-V3GSP disagreement, with pre-registered calib_frac=0.20 and pre-declared coverage targets {100, 90, 80, 70, 60, 50}, yields retained-subset CCC monotonically increasing in disagreement-based deferral, with 70% coverage CCC ≥ 0.74 and 50% coverage CCC ≥ 0.78.
slots.kill_criteria: Calibration set threshold variance across outer folds > 20% of mean threshold (kimi+gemini consensus) OR monotonicity broken (CCC at 50% < CCC at 70%)
slots.tri_cli_endorsement: kimi+gemini+deepseek+codex all endorse as cleanest rigor

slots.hypothesis: Same conformal architecture on T3 iter47 predictions with a second orthogonal predictor (T3 per-task meta from WILDCARD_B or a 7-IMU-subset LGB baseline) yields meaningful T3 retained-subset deployment metrics.
slots.conditional_on: WILDCARD_B completes OR a T3 variant predictor is available

slots.hypothesis: Stride-segmented binary FoG detection (item 11 ≥1 vs =0) aggregated to subject-level rate + duration + variance features, added to iter34 Stage-3 input, lifts item-11 specific CCC by Δ≥+0.05 LOOCV (effective N at stride level ≈ 10× subject).
slots.kill_criteria_5fold: binary FoG classifier subject-level AUROC < 0.65 OR stride-aggregated features fail K=500 LGB inclusion at top-50
slots.conditional_on: WILDCARD_A and WILDCARD_B both clear OR all FWER members fail

leakage_firewall_invariants: All Ridge meta blends fit inside outer LOOCV fold via inductive_lib.FoldNormalizer (no train/test leakage)
All per-task LGB specialists trained on V3-GSP cache (manifest-validated)
Conformal calibration set drawn from outer-train only (split_conformal); never touches outer-test
5-null gate run before any LOOCV lockbox (scrambled label, SID shuffle, canary feature, library exclusion, transductive sanity)
Seed lists pre-declared and immutable from this lock timestamp
decision_rules: If WILDCARD_A 5-fold screen clears (Δ≥+0.010, seed_std<0.025): proceed to LOOCV lockbox.
If WILDCARD_A LOOCV clears Bonferroni-adjusted gate (frac>0 ≥ 0.9875): supersedes iter34 as canonical T1 candidate.
If WILDCARD_A fails: document wall data point, do NOT extend to A.5 variants.
WILDCARD_B contingent on WILDCARD_A clearing 5-fold; same kill rule applies.
T1_CONFORMAL_LOCKBOX runs independently; passes if monotonic CCC curve achieved AND coverage variance kill criterion held.
T3_A_GSP_SCREEN: kill on 5-fold failure; do NOT promote to LOOCV regardless of seed_std (tri-CLI prior <15%).
STRIDE_LOCKED_FoG: only run if items above fail OR if specific user request.
rejected_slots_with_reason: T3-GSP-LOOCV-direct: rejected — 4-CLI prior 3-15% clearing Bonferroni n=3; observability-bounded (T3 residual driven by upper-limb brady which lumbar/shank GSP cannot encode).
T3-IPW-stabilized: rejected — 4-CLI prior 2-20%; site/severity collinearity makes IPW variance-inflating without lift.
Bayesian SVI iter56 retry at N=92: rejected — seed-42 LOOCV CCC=0.2851 (decisive fail) confirmed codex+gemini priors.
External cohort transfer: BLOCKED — all 6 routes (PPMI/Verily, PPP/PD-VME, WATCH-PD, CNS Portugal, Hssayeni/MJFF, ICICLE) still DUA-gated.
